jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
